task.summary: Default task

API is now functional. Updated a plethora of methods and revised the hook class. Some widget ids are likely broken and will need revisiting. I should really check on the shoddy built-in compilation sometime.
Forgot a fairly important class
Modulated and revised Application.java and RuneLite.java
Prepped dependency changes and some misc things
gradle fix
In progress update to how widget info should be stored and called
Continued to revise codebase to centralize WidgetIds Started prepping transitional stuff to enable resizable mode functionality
Skills and GrandExchange revised
Finished revising Prayer for widget id centralization
Revised the input location for scripts
README.md update
Fix README.md
Added generated API reference

Removed legacy code, updated non-functional UI aspects to look significantly better, improved security functionality for the password/pin display as well as fixed a bug causing them to display if they were filled. Fixed a bug that required a client relaunch due to the model of the combobox for Account store not being updated. Revised README.md.

Revised RSObject to better document and fix getDef (this is totally not the first time I've written those words) Revised a number of classes to remove Javadoc errors and improved commenting on classes such as RSTile The general use case by most plugins appears to be similar, so we're going to revert to that use case. If issues appear we'll need to see what thread exactly is making that call I suppose.

Updated Gradle to support and use JDK 17.
No longer three years out of date! Added a duplication strategy to exclude if collisions do occur Changed the compile methods in the gradle.build to implementation (the manner they are suppose to be done now)

Javadocs Update
Replaced all instances of the tt tag with code Updated all Javadocs

Javadocs Update
Resolved Conflicts in Combat.java
Revised build files to be Kotlin
Project Language Level 16
Fix launch error involving RuneLite adding RuntimeConfigLoader as a parameter for the client loader
Reverting Kotlin change as it breaks with Jitpack Will look for alternatives later
Updating RuneLite Version
Remove waste code from wrappers
Fix the issues caused by multi-bot prep
Fix recent update breaking the client
Fixes some RSWidget issues
Forgot the index value
Remove waste code from wrappers Fix new hook
Added auto-versioning to he Gradle build file
Removed semicolons from Groovy build.gradle

Fixed the issue causing initial boots to fail when a user has never ran RuneLite before
Added Dockerfile configs
Updated the gitignore
Removed Dockerfile from main repo
Removed running the cache loading on a separate thread (I mean if you were fast enough this would break it for sure)
Rephrased a todo and moved code to a more correct location in the cache loader
Some test changes for Widget Bank and Inventory updated to be now correct Fixed a bug with withdraw where values of one didn't work
Finalize dn
Finalize dn
Finalize dn
Remove forums mention
Added .idea back to .gitignore to prevent future tampering
Fixes a few errors spammed in chat and the .idea gitignore and add headless run config
Fix workspace

MESSAGE.value:
Javadocs Update
Resolved Conflicts in Combat.java
Revised build files to be Kotlin
Project Language Level 16
Fix launch error involving RuneLite adding RuntimeConfigLoader as a parameter for the client loader
Reverting Kotlin change as it breaks with Jitpack Will look for alternatives later
Updating RuneLite Version
Remove waste code from wrappers
Fix the issues caused by multi-bot prep
Fix recent update breaking the client
Fixes some RSWidget issues
Forgot the index value
Remove waste code from wrappers Fix new hook
Added auto-versioning to he Gradle build file
Removed semicolons from Groovy build.gradle

Fixed the issue causing initial boots to fail when a user has never ran RuneLite before
Added Dockerfile configs
Updated the gitignore
Removed Dockerfile from main repo
Removed running the cache loading on a separate thread (I mean if you were fast enough this would break it for sure)
Rephrased a todo and moved code to a more correct location in the cache loader
Some test changes for Widget Bank and Inventory updated to be accurate
Some test changes for Widget Bank and Inventory updated to be now correct Fixed a bug with withdraw where values of one didn't work
Finalize dn
Remove forums mention
Added .idea back to .gitignore to prevent future tampering
Fixes a few errors spammed in chat and the .idea gitignore and add headless run config
Fix workspace
